name: CSnCompany_2-0
description: CSnCOMPANY — A virtual AI team for Claude Code. Each plugin is a teammate (CEO / PM / Architect / Designer / QA / Reviewer / DevOps) that takes you from idea to ship.

plugins.name: cs-end
plugins.description: 🏁 Session Closer — 4-Agent analysis + TIL save + plugin version-up + GitHub push (/cs-end)

plugins.name: cs-ceo
plugins.description: 🧭 CEO — Estimates effort and autonomously dispatches across CS-test/CS-plan/CS-codebase-review/cs-design/cs-smart-run. v5.2 adds External Knowledge Gate + partnership protocols.

plugins.name: cs-clarify
plugins.description: 💬 PM — Requirements clarification before planning. 4-agent Socratic elicitation surfaces hidden assumptions, validates scope, prevents over-engineering.

plugins.name: CS-plan
plugins.description: 🏗️ Architect — TDD + Clean Architecture 4-agent planner. Domain analysis, architecture design, test strategy, implementation checklist.

plugins.name: cs-design
plugins.description: 🎨 Designer — 5-agent parallel design review: visual hierarchy, interaction quality, design-system consistency, responsive/accessibility, anti-pattern detection.

plugins.name: cs-design-sample1
plugins.description: 🎨 Design Reference — Crextio-inspired warm cream palette + amber/slate accents. Audit & apply to Tailwind/Next.js dashboards.

plugins.name: CS-test
plugins.description: 🧪 QA Engineer — 14-agent web testing: security, SEO, performance, accessibility, DB, PWA, touch, image optimization.

plugins.name: CS-codebase-review
plugins.description: 🔍 Code Reviewer — 5-agent parallel review: Architecture, Quality, Security, Performance, Maintainability.

plugins.name: cs-ship
plugins.description: 🚢 DevOps — Pre-PR validation gate. 4-agent team checks spec compliance, coverage, commit-message quality before merge.

plugins.name: cs-smart-run
plugins.description: ⚡ Team Lead — Two-phase orchestrator: plan with Opus → execute with Sonnet agents in parallel.

plugins.name: cs-experiencing
plugins.description: 📚 Knowledge Keeper — Meta-router across CS-test / CS-plan / CS-codebase-review / cs-design with versioned learnings. Includes /cs-end session-wrap.

plugins.name: convo-maker
plugins.description: 🗣️ Language Coach — Convert session Q&A into natural American English conversations for language learning.
